description: Pershing Square Inc. operates as an alternative asset manager. The company was formerly known as Pershing Square Holdco, L.P. The company was incorporated in 2024 and is based in New York, New York. Pershing Square Inc. operates as a subsidiary of Pershing Square Partner Group, LLC.
mos_flag: NO — yield does not compensate for business risk
